ListItem.Para: Valve is deactivated in bypass position.
At least one left cabin air compressor operates normally.
At least one right cabin air compressor operates normally.

Note.Para: For an air conditioning pack to be operating normally, certain items associated with that system must operate normally. See DDG item 21-51-01 for a list of those items.
For a cabin air compressor to be operating normally, certain items must operate normally. See MEL item 21-52-01 for a list of those items.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate upper recirculation heat exchanger diverter valve in closed/bypass position (AMM DDG 21-53-03).

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the ICS RECIRC VLV - DIVERTER UPPER circuit breaker and lock with an INOP tag.
On INTEGRATED COOLING maintenance page 2, confirm UPPER RECIRC HX DIVERTER VLV POS indicates 0.
For UPPER RECIRC HX DIVERTER VLV POS not indicating 0:
Gain access to upper recirculation heat exchanger diverter valve.
Manually turn the open/close knob until the valve is in the CLS/BYP position.
Valve is deactivated in bypass position.
At least one left cabin air compressor operates normally.
At least one right cabin air compressor operates normally.

Note.Para: For an air conditioning pack to be operating normally, certain items associated with that system must operate normally. See MEL item 21-51-01 for a list of those items.
For a cabin air compressor to be operating normally, certain items must operate normally. See MEL item 21-52-01 for a list of those items.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate lower recirculation heat exchanger diverter valve in closed/bypass position (AMM DDG 21-53-03).

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the ICS RECIRC VLV-LIQUID DIVERTER circuit breaker and lock with an INOP tag.
On INTEGRATED COOLING maintenance page 2, confirm LOWER RECIRC HX DIVERTER VLV POS indicates 0.
For LOWER RECIRC HX DIVERTER VLV POS not indicating 0:
Gain access to lower recirculation heat exchanger diverter valve.
Manually turn the open/close knob until the valve is in the CLS/BYP position.
